name: Cantonese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen french style green beans
1 cup Lite dairy sour cream (or yogurt cheese mixed with 1 tablespoon cornstarch and a little lemon juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the green beans and drain well.
2. Melt butter in a pan, blend in flour, add milk, soy sauce, sour cream (or yogurt cheese mixture), diced ham, and thinly sliced water chestnuts.
3. Stir until all ingredients are combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a sprayed baking dish.
5. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top and season generously with paprika.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
